channel.title: Browser on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Browser on Arrans github.io

item.title: xenova/transformers.js
item.description: State-of-the-art Machine Learning for the web. Run 🤗 Transformers directly in your browser, with no need for a server!

item.title: qutebrowser/qutebrowser
item.description: A keyboard-driven, vim-like browser based on Python and Qt.

item.title: dillo-browser/dillo
item.description: Dillo, a multi-platform graphical web browser

item.title: salvadordf/CEF4Delphi
item.description: CEF4Delphi is an open source project to embed Chromium-based browsers in applications made with Delphi or Lazarus/FPC for Windows, Linux and MacOS.

item.title: gildas-lormeau/zip.js
item.description: JavaScript library to zip and unzip files supporting multi-core compression, compression streams, zip64, split files and encryption.

item.title: olebedev/go-starter-kit
item.description: [abandoned] Golang isomorphic react/hot reloadable/redux/css-modules/SSR starter kit
